backend.changelog: Diagnostic launch-timing refinement: the Generate timing breakdown now reports how much of the startup time was spent waiting on the 'generate anyway' confirmation dialog (user think+click) vs machine work. No change to generation behaviour.

cadBridge.changelog: Diagnostic timing instrumentation: the Generate timing summary now splits the setup phase into 'foreign-doc cleanup' vs 'BOM-root open/activate' so large-assembly launch time can be attributed. No change to generation behaviour.
